title: Shared Agent Memory
tagline: A collective long-term memory your whole team of agents can read and write.
summary: One memory, many agents, any machine
Append-only entries keep concurrent writes safe
Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or any MCP client
whyItMatters: Redis-backed filesystem means every agent sees learnings in real time, with sub-millisecond reads. Agent A's discovery from yesterday is Agent B's starting point today — no copy-paste, no syncing.
firstPrompt: What do you already know about this workspace? Grep shared-memory/ and summarize.
